I was unable to create the `index.html` file because Hermes Agent requires Git for Windows to be installed on your system. It seems that Git Bash, which is used for shell operations, was not found.

Could you please confirm if you have finished installing Git for Windows? If so, ensure that `bash.exe` is in your system's PATH, or you can set the `HERMES_GIT_BASH_PATH` environment variable to the full path of your `bash.exe` (e.g., `C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe`).

Once Git is properly configured, I can generate the `index.html` file for you.
